title: At the apéro
setting: It's Friday and your colleagues have set out wine and snacks. You join the circle.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Hoi! Schön bisch au cho. Es Glas Wii?
steps.en: Hey! Nice you came too. A glass of wine?

options.feedback: Warm, easy, and you toast the moment — perfect apéro energy.
Totally fine — but ask for a Süessmoscht or water so you still join the toast.
Reads as reluctant to be there. A simple yes or alternative keeps it friendly.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Mer stosst aa. Lueg mer aber i d'Auge, susch git's Päch!
steps.en: Let's clink. But look me in the eye, or it's bad luck!

options.es: Ha, das weiss ich scho. Pröschtli!
options.en: Ha, I know that one already. Cheers!
options.feedback: Showing you know the custom signals you've settled in. Nicely done.

options.es: Aha, das han ich nöd gwüsst. Pröschtli!
options.en: Ah, I didn't know that. Cheers!
options.feedback: Honest and game — and now you've learned a lovely local ritual.
True, but waving off the ritual can feel like waving off the group. Play along.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Und, häsch scho Plän fürs Wuchenänd?
steps.en: So, got any plans for the weekend?

options.es: Ich wott uf de Pilatus go wandere, wenn s'Wätter haltet.
options.en: I want to hike up Pilatus, if the weather holds.
options.feedback: Specific, local, and opens the door to more chat. Great small talk.
Fine, but offering even a small plan keeps the conversation going.
Treats friendly small talk as an interrogation. Just share something light.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Tönt super. Mir gönd nöchste Wuche zäme go biere, chunsch mit?
steps.en: Sounds great. We're going for beers together next week, want to come?

options.es: Sehr gärn! Säg mer eifach, wänn und wo.
options.en: I'd love to! Just tell me when and where.
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and easy — exactly how an invitation becomes a friendship.
Non-committal cools the invite — a warmer yes builds the bond.
That's the point of coming — saying yes is how you stop being the new one.
